page_title: List of omni-directional mobility gears (Attack on Titan Game)
text:
Omni-directional Mobility Gear is the player's primary means of three dimensional movement in Attack on Titan. It is rated by Reel Speed (how fast the player is pulled into a Titan), Anchor Range (how far away a player can grapple a target), and Anchor Strength (how long a player may remain attached to a Titan).

Omni-directional Mobility Gear can be further fortified for additional Reel Speed and Anchor Strength.

List of Omni-directional Mobility Gear
